commit.subject: LU-19655 docs: Document llapi_dir_create* functions
commit.message:
LU-19655 docs: Document llapi_dir_create* functions

This patch adds man pages for llapi_dir_create(),
llapi_dir_create_foreign() and llapi_dir_create_pool().
